title: Motherboard vehicle chassis
abstract: Vehicle chassis comprising: - a plurality of subassemblies to be electrically interconnected, at least two of the plurality of subassemblies comprising at least one connecting plug arranged to receive a connector, characterized in that: the chassis comprises a connecting plate, comprising a plurality of connectors defined so that each one of the at least one connecting plugs has a compatible connector in the plurality of connectors, and comprising an internal wiring between the connectors so as to interconnect said at least two of the plurality of subassemblies when each one or the connectors of the connecting plate is connected with its compatible connecting plug of said at least two of the plurality of subassemblies.
claims: Claims 1. Vehicle chassis comprising: - a plurality of subassemblies (12a, 12b) to be electrically interconnected, at least two of the plurality of subassemblies (12a, 12b) comprising at least one connecting plug (13a, 13b) arranged to receive a connector (23a, 23b), characterized in that: the chassis comprises a connecting plate (20), comprising a plurality of connectors (23a, 23b) defined so that each one of the at least one connecting plugs (13a, 13b) has a compatible connector (23a, 23b) in the plurality of connectors (23a, 23b), and comprising an internal wiring between the connectors (23a, 23b) so as to interconnect said at least two of the plurality of subassemblies (12a, 12b) when each one of the connectors (23a, 23b) of the connecting plate (20) is connected with its compatible connecting plug (13a, 13b) of said at least two of the plurality of subassemblies (12a, 12b). 2. Vehicle chassis according to the preceding claim, wherein the connecting plate (20) is a composite structure integrating a reinforcing space frame, such as a chassis box 3. Vehicle chassis according to the preceding claim, wherein each one of the connecting plugs (13a, 13b) is arranged to receive its compatible connector (23a, 23b) along a connecting direction, and wherein the plurality of subassemblies (12a, 12b) are attached to the chassis with all the connecting plugs (13a, 13b) oriented so as to present the same connecting direction. 4. Vehicle chassis according to the preceding claim, wherein at least one of the plurality of subassemblies (12a, 12b) comprises a connecting plug (13a, 13b) attached to its subassembly, to allow automatic connection with its compatible connector (23a, 23b)during the attachment to the chassis of said at least one subassembly and/or during the attachment to the chassis of the connecting plate (20). 5. Vehicle chassis according to the preceding claim, wherein each one of the plurality of subassemblies (12a, 12b) comprises a connecting plug (13a, 13b) attached to its subassembly, to allow automatic connection with its compatible connector (23a, 23b)during the attachment to the chassis of each one subassembly and/or during the attachment to the chassis of the connecting plate (20) 6. Vehicle chassis according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the connecting plate (20) is a composite structure with a top plate and a bottom plate, sandwiching the internal wiring. 7. Vehicle chassis according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the connecting plate (20) comprises at least one reinforcement layer, wherein the connecting plate (20) is attached to a first side of the chassis. 8. Vehicle chassis according to the preceding claim, wherein the chassis comprises a sealing plate (41) attached to a second side of the chassis. 9. Vehicle chassis according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein each one of the plurality of subassemblies (12a, 12b) is attached in a front portion of the chassis, or in a rear portion of the chassis, so as to distribute the total weight of the plurality of subassemblies (12a, 12b) between the front portion and the rear portion of the chassis. 10. Vehicle chassis according to the preceding claim, comprising at least four wheel anchorages, wherein at least two wheel anchorages are arranged in the rear portion of the chassis, and at least two wheel anchorages are arranged in the front portion of the chassis. 11. Vehicle chassis according to the preceding claim, wherein the connecting plate (20) comprises a rear plate (22) and a front plate (21) separated by a connecting line (25), the rear plate (22) and the front plate (21) being detachable from each other. 12. Vehicle chassis according to the preceding claim, wherein the connecting plate (20) comprises a spacer plate (31) arranged between the rear plate (22) and the front plate (21). 13. Vehicle chassis according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein each one of the connecting plugs (13a, 13b) or each one of the connectors (23a, 23b) present some degree of freedom with their attachment, to allow mechanical attachment to the chassis of the subassembly and/or of the connecting plate (20), before electric connection between each one of the connecting plugs (13a, 13b) and each one of the connectors (23a, 23b). 14. Vehicle chassis according to any one of claims 1 to 12, wherein the chassis comprises locators arranged to locate each one of the subassemblies (12a, 12b) and the connecting plate (20) onto the chassis, so as to permit a simultaneous mechanical attachment of each one of the subassembly and the connecting plate (20) and electrical connection between each one of the connecting plugs (13a, 13b) and each one of the connectors (23a, 23b). 15. Vehicle chassis according to any one of the preceding claims, comprising a chassis box in which the plurality of subassemblies (12a, 12b) is installed. 16. Vehicle chassis according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the connecting plate comprises at least one fluid pipe to connect at least one of the plurality of subassemblies to a specific unit of the vehicle. 17. Vehicle chassis according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the connecting plate comprises at least one metallic grid or frame arranged so as to form a Faraday's cage to electric apparatuses comprised in the vehicle chassis. 18. Vehicle comprising a vehicle chassis according to any one of the preceding claims.
